steps.title: Spot the number requirement
steps.content: The first sentence mentions “Both Pontianak, Indonesia, and Manta, Ecuador” — two cities. The second sentence's “In other words” restates this, so the blank must contain a word referring to both cities, requiring a plural demonstrative.

steps.title: Match the demonstrative to the noun
steps.content:
These is the only plural demonstrative and correctly modifies the plural noun cities — referring to both cities mentioned. Each is always singular, and that and this are singular demonstratives that don't agree with a plural noun.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
